titleStmt.title: SII 9.219: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 219. (A.R. No. 78 of 1904.) ON THE 6TH SLAB SET UP IN THE RUINED TEMPLE CLOSE TO THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and the date is lost. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and states that, while his feudatory Tribhuvanamalla-Pāṇḍyadēva was ruling over Noḷambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand, the general Kāḷimayya granted some land to a satra for feeding Brāhmans.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāsrayaṁ śrīpritvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ para
mēsvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāsrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī
matribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamutarōttarābhivri
(r)dhdhipravardhdhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire ©
tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda mahāma(ṁ)ṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ
kāṁcīpuravarādhīsvaraṁ yaduvaṁṣāṁbaradyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi
nijakuḷakamaḷamārttaṇḍaṁ paricchēdigaṇḍaṁ rājigacōḷamanōbhaṅgaṁ srīma
tribhuvanamalladēvapādābjabhriṁgaṁ nāmādisamastaprasasti
sahitaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamallapāṇḍyadēvaru noḷaṁbavāḍi mū
vatticchāsiramuma duṣṭanigrahasiṣṭapratipāḷanaṁ māḍi sukhadiṁ
rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇa
mōnānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiniyamahōmaśīḷaguṇasaṁpannarappa
śrīmatu hariccaṁdradattiyagrahāra bāḷguḷiyūroḍeyapra
mukhamahājanamayva gōtrada sa
rvvātityara kāḷimayyaṁgaḷa ma da bhūmi
yoḷage cāḷukyavikramavarṣada tsarada
Āśvayuja sudda pōrṇimāsye sōmagrahaṇa vyatīpāta radaṁdu brā
hmaṇabhōjanakkaṁ bāvigaṁ Aṟa kaṭṭeya keḷa
ge kammaṁ 450 mattaṁ satra ne hosaū
ra haḷḷada teṁkaṇa Intī dharmmama(ṁ) na
vvadiṁbaru pratipāḷisi yarghyatīrttha
dalu sāyira kapileya koṭṭa phalavakkumī
dharmmamanaḷidavarā puṇyasthānadalanibaru brāhmaṇarumananitu kavileyu
maṁ svahastavadheyaṁ māḍida pātakamakkuṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harē
ti vasundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇāṁ viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 9.219 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
